Description: Anonymous ID assigned to each participant.
Unique Qualtrics response ID identifying the participant's survey session.
Part of speech of the rated word: Adj = adjective, Nou = noun, Ver = verb.
Experimental list version presented to the participant.

Synthetic unique identifier for a single word-presentation trial. It combines the first source-file row of the participant-session-list block and the source-file stimulus-column index. It does not encode the temporal order in which stimuli were presented.
Italian word presented to the participant.

Participant's valence rating on a 1–9 scale: 1 = exclusively negative feelings, 5 = neutral feelings, 9 = exclusively positive feelings. An empty cell indicates that no response was recorded for the presented item.
Participant's arousal rating on a 1–9 scale: 1 = calm or low activation, 5 = medium activation, 9 = high activation. An empty cell indicates that no response was recorded for the presented item.

Participant's dominance rating on a 1–9 scale: 1 = powerlessness or low sense of control, 5 = medium control, 9 = high sense of control. An empty cell indicates that no response was recorded for the presented item.
Indicator for the checkbox 'Clicca qui se non conosci il significato di questa parola': 0 = not selected, 1 = selected.
